textByHashes.c2633602320d4c200d4786bb4cc947ad6c1ec191: Isn't it wonderful? So many books, so much knowledge to be absorbed!
textByHashes.9ad577925494b0f0bd2b8bf94c654b132fd8d253: Where did I see that book? It can't be far...
textByHashes.731f79920aacb40de075d0b114df87f8cfa2d086: I'm sure it was around here somewhere...
textByHashes.ad3bcf1b13b5254d32811ba0d5f3b6e50bd0df17: What can I do for ya?
textByHashes.8dd3c798a593bf7593bf5713002b4ea58685ca84: I've always found Prifddinas' History to be fascinating!
textByHashes.505102d5ce69844aefb3ed9f4d91bc57edda82d0: I've always found The Great Divide to be fascinating!
textByHashes.689b114e9901f62a14ba691dd68f8f281d7f1a0f: I've always found Big Book of Bangs to be fascinating!
textByHashes.ec139c714f6cd4cfbb648119d711da177c94165d: I've always found The Journal of Randas to be fascinating!
textByHashes.26156d30600522d678dabae8195c851c05aaee4f: I've always found Ode to Eternity to be fascinating!
